VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Origin Jumpworks
Focus: Expedition

This multi-role luxury vessel from Origin Jumpworks features an exquisitely detailed hull design that balances performance and versatility in a sleek and timeless form. The 600i is designed with a cutting-edge modular technology, allowing you to customize your ship for your needs.
